# Tooltip

Provides supplemental context when a control is hovered or focused.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/tooltip
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="tooltip"
  example={0}
  code={`<Tooltip.Provider>
  <Tooltip.Root>
    <Tooltip.Trigger>Help</Tooltip.Trigger>
    <Tooltip.Content>Helpful context</Tooltip.Content>
  </Tooltip.Root>
</Tooltip.Provider>`}
/>

```tsx
<Tooltip.Provider>
  <Tooltip.Root>
    <Tooltip.Trigger>Help</Tooltip.Trigger>
    <Tooltip.Content>Helpful context</Tooltip.Content>
  </Tooltip.Root>
</Tooltip.Provider>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="tooltip"
  example={1}
  code={`<Tooltip.Provider>
  <Tooltip.Root defaultOpen>
    <Tooltip.Trigger>Pinned</Tooltip.Trigger>
    <Tooltip.Content side="bottom">Visible by default</Tooltip.Content>
  </Tooltip.Root>
</Tooltip.Provider>`}
/>

```tsx
<Tooltip.Provider>
  <Tooltip.Root defaultOpen>
    <Tooltip.Trigger>Pinned</Tooltip.Trigger>
    <Tooltip.Content side="bottom">Visible by default</Tooltip.Content>
  </Tooltip.Root>
</Tooltip.Provider>
```
